title: Impresso OCR Benchmark Document JSON Schema
description: Schema for OCR post-correction benchmark submissions and reference data. Version: 2026-04-09. Updated to make WER/CER requirements conditional on ground truth availability and support backward-compatible placeholder values.

document_metadata.description: Metadata about the document, including primary dataset and segmentation details.

primary_dataset_name.description: The name of the primary dataset the document originates from.

primary_dataset_filename.description: The filename of the primary dataset.

primary_dataset_doi.description: The DOI (Digital Object Identifier) of the primary dataset.

benchmark_dataset_doi.description: The DOI (Digital Object Identifier) of the primary dataset.

primary_dataset_url.description: An URL for background information on the primary dataset (useful if missing DOI).

primary_dataset_version.description: The version of the primary dataset.

primary_dataset_license.description: The license of the primary dataset.

benchmark_dataset_name.description: The name of the benchmark dataset this document belongs to.

benchmark_dataset_split.description: The data split of the benchmark dataset this document belongs to; used in the benchmark.

document_type.description: The type of the document (e.g., newspaper).

document_id.description: The unique identifier for the document (taken from primary dataset).

publication_title.description: The title of the publication the document belongs to.

transcription_unit_scope.description: The scope of the transcription unit (e.g., page, article, or paragraph).

segmentation_origin_article.description: Specifies the source of article segmentation, if applicable (e.g., derived from a legacy dataset digitization campaign, manually segmented, or produced by a newer system).

segmentation_origin_lines.description: Specifies the source of line segmentation.

segmentation_origin_sentences.description: Specifies the source of sentence segmentation.

segmentation_origin_paragraphs.description: Specifies the source of paragraph segmentation.

img_support_transcription_unit_iiif_url.description: The IIIF URL for the image of the transcription unit.

img_support_transcription_unit_img_filep.description: The file path for the image of the transcription unit (relative to data JSON file).

ocr_hypothesis.description: OCR hypothesis and related analysis results.

transcription_unit.description: The OCR transcription of the unit scope in this document. This is the text to be improved by the post-ocr correction system.

num_tokens.description: The number of tokens in the OCR transcription unit.

num_chars.description: The number of characters in the OCR transcription unit.

paragraph_offsets.description: Paragraph start and end offsets, relative to the GT transcription unit. Empty array when not available.

line_offsets.description: Line start and end offsets, relative to the GT transcription unit. Empty array when not available.

sentence_offsets.description: Sentence start and end offsets, relative to the GT transcription unit. Empty array when not available.

quality_report.description: Automatically generated report evaluating OCR quality using substitution, insertion, deletion counts, and alignment scores (towards the ground truth). Empty object when not available.

nb_char_errors.description: Total number of character errors (substitutions + deletions + insertions).

wer.description: Word Error Rate (WER) of the OCR transcription.

cer.description: Character Error Rate (CER) of the OCR transcription.

ocr_quality_score.description: Overall OCR quality score obtained with https://huggingface.co/impresso-project/OCR-quality-assessment-unigram. Used internally.

alignment_score_transcription_unit.description: Alignment score between the transcription unit and the ground truth.

alignment_score_paragraphs.description: Alignment scores between each OCR paragraph and its corresponding ground truth paragraph.

alignment_score_sentences.description: Alignment scores between each OCR paragraph and its corresponding ground truth paragraph.

alignment_score_lines.description: Alignment scores between each OCR paragraph and its corresponding ground truth paragraph.

ground_truth.description: Ground truth data for the OCR transcription unit.

transcription_unit.description: The ground truth transcription of the unit. Empty string when not available.

num_tokens.description: Number of tokens in the ground truth transcription. Zero when not available.

num_chars.description: Number of characters in the ground truth transcription. Zero when not available.

quality_report.description: Automatically generated report evaluating OCR quality using substitution, insertion, deletion counts, and alignment scores (towards the ground truth).

ocr_quality_score.description: OCR quality score for the transcription. Used internally for the benchmark preparation.

oneOf.description: Empty array when no ground truth transcription is available (backward compatibility).

paragraph_offsets.description: Paragraph offsets in the ground truth transcription. Empty array when not available.

line_offsets.description: Line offsets in the ground truth transcription. Empty array when not available.

sentence_offsets.description: Sentence offsets in the ground truth transcription. Empty array when not available.

ocr_postcorrection_output.description: Output of the OCR post-correction system on the OCR hypothesis.

ocr_postcorrection_system.description: Alias or name of the system that produced the post-correction.

num_tokens.description: Number of tokens in the post-corrected transcription.

num_chars.description: Number of characters in the post-corrected transcription.

quality_report.description: Quality metrics for the post-corrected output. Empty object when not computed.

nb_char_substitutions.description: Number of character substitutions of the OCR post-corrected unit.

nb_char_deletions.description: Number of character deletions of the OCR post-corrected unit.

nb_char_insertions.description: Number of character insertions of the OCR post-corrected unit.

nb_char_errors.description: Total number of character errors (substitutions + deletions + insertions) of the OCR post-corrected unit.

wer.description: Word Error Rate (WER) of the OCR post-corrected unit.

cer.description: Character Error Rate (CER) of the OCR post-corrected unit.

note.description: Any additional information about the document.
